sensitive_file_access.response: 550 Permission denied. Action requires 'sudo'. Please provide admin password.
sensitive_file_access.note: Baits the attacker into attempting password guessing.

sensitive_file_access.response: 550 Permission denied. Unauthorized access attempt logged and reported to admin 'j.doe'.
sensitive_file_access.note: Plants a fake admin username and suggests active monitoring.

unrecognized_command.response: 500 Command not recognized. Did you mean 'help'?
unrecognized_command.note: Probes if the attacker is simply exploring available commands.
A standard, slightly more informative FTP error.
A generic error that might confuse automated tools.

reconnaissance.response: 200 System status: nominal. All services running.
reconnaissance.note: Generic positive response to recon commands.

reconnaissance.response: 451 Requested action aborted: local error in processing. High CPU load detected.
reconnaissance.note: Simulates a struggling server to deter aggressive scanning.
